What's New In rPickle 0.15
====================================

:Release: 2026-07-16
:Version: 0.15.0

Protocol Upgrade
----------------

- v4 protocol officially introduced
- ``complex`` serialization optimized (real/imag packed directly)
- ``_STRUCT_COMPILE`` and ``_OBM`` promoted to global constants
- Backward compatibility for loading v1–v3 data

Testing
-------

- 79 tests, all passing
- ``core.py`` coverage: 97%
